reviews.comment:
La peor atención de TODO Buenos Aires, los playeros maleducados, no prestan atención por estar hablando entre ellos o prendidos a sus celulares y cometen errores gravísimos como equivocar el tipo de combustible solicitado (poner diesel en lugar de nafta!!). Hay que pelearse para que respondan unos crápulas!

(Translated by Google)
The worst service in ALL of Buenos Aires! The attendants are rude, they don't pay attention because they're talking amongst themselves or glued to their cell phones, and they make serious mistakes like putting in the wrong type of fuel (diesel instead of gasoline!). You practically have to fight to get a response from these scoundrels!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4834150439448216609/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNZOUpIRG1nRRAB

reviews.comment:
Una excelentisima Estación de Servicio en un punto muy difícil para cargar nafta.
Lamentablemente,  desde que funciona el Metrobus,  los autos que hacen cola para cargar nafta, inutilizan un carril, y tornan muy complicado circular en horas pico

(Translated by Google)
An excellent gas station in a very difficult location for refueling.
Unfortunately, since the Metrobus began operating, the cars queuing for gas block one lane, making traffic very difficult during rush hour.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4834150439448216609/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURvMC1QdEp3EAE
